data_health_narrative: Excellent (100/100) - All systems operating within contract boundaries.

steps: 1. Revert commit that changed confidence scale

ai_risk_assessment.narrative: AI systems are operating within acceptable thresholds.

recommended_actions.action: Fix confidence scale in extraction pipeline
recommended_actions.specific_change: Change from: confidence = score * 100  → To: confidence = score
recommended_actions.details: Update the confidence calculation to output float in [0.0, 1.0] instead of integer 0-100
recommended_actions.risk_reduction: Eliminates CRITICAL violations affecting downstream consumers

recommended_actions.specific_change: Run: UPDATE extracted_facts SET confidence = confidence / 100.0 WHERE confidence > 1.0
recommended_actions.details: Convert existing records with 0-100 scale to 0.0-1.0 scale
recommended_actions.risk_reduction: Fixes historical data to comply with contract

recommended_actions.action: Add pre-commit hook for contract validation
recommended_actions.specific_change: Add contract validation step to pre-commit hooks
recommended_actions.details: Prevent confidence scale changes from reaching production without validation
recommended_actions.risk_reduction: Catches violations before commit, preventing silent failures
